parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: { inputs: { text: $json.body.query_text }, top_k: 5 }, rerank: { model: 'bge-reranker-v2-m3', top_n: 3, rank_fields: ['content'] } }) }}

nodes.name: Search Pinecone
nodes.notes: Search Pinecone for relevant article chunks. Uses multilingual-e5-large embeddings with reranking.

nodes.name: LLM Synthesis
nodes.notes: Call Claude to synthesize analysis from retrieved context.

meta.description: RAG pipeline: receives query -> searches Pinecone -> synthesizes with Claude -> returns analysis with citations
